Name: SHIELD_PARAM_ST
Description: Defines certain shield or PA-related values for players and NPCs.

Fields.Name: Guard Base Dummy Poly ID
Fields.Description: Dummy Poly ID used as the direction reference (-1 is Master)

Fields.Name: Guard Detect Position Master Override
Fields.Description: Whether to detect if the position is the character's Master position, rather than the dummy poly position.

Fields.Name: Pulse Armor Guard Base Dummy Poly ID
Fields.Description: Dummy poly ID used for Pulse Armor.

Fields.Name: Pulse Armor Detect Position Master Override
Fields.Description: Whether to detect if the position is the character's Master position, rather than the dummy poly position.

Fields.Name: Pulse Armor Guard Base Dummy Poly ID
Fields.Description: Dummy poly ID used for Pulse Armor.

Fields.Name: Pulse Armor Detect Position Master Override
Fields.Description: Whether to detect if the position is the character's Master position, rather than the dummy poly position.

Fields.Name: Pulse Armor Recovery Guard Value
Fields.Description: Specifies when PA can be used again after a guard break.
